generated_oml:
instance TemperatureSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Temperature sensor for building environmental monitoring"
    DTDFVocab:producedData TemperatureData
]

instance HumiditySensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Humidity sensor for building environmental monitoring"
    DTDFVocab:producedData HumidityData
]

instance TemperatureData : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom TemperatureSensor
]

instance HumidityData : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom HumiditySensor
]

instance TemperatureDataRecord : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Real-time temperature data records"
    DTDFVocab:fromData TemperatureData
    DTDFVocab:inputTo EclipseHono
]

instance HumidityDataRecord : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Real-time humidity data records"
    DTDFVocab:fromData HumidityData
    DTDFVocab:inputTo EclipseHono
]

instance BuildingInformationModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Building Information Modeling (BIM) for device modeling of sensors, actuators, and controllers"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo ModelDrivenEngineeringEnabler
]

instance ModelDrivenEngineeringEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Model-Driven Engineering (MDE) transforming enriched BIM models into structured digital twin artifacts"
    DTDFVocab:enables RealTimeMonitoringService, PredictiveAnalyticsService
]

instance EclipseHono : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Eclipse Hono for real-time data exchange"
    DTDFVocab:enables RealTimeMonitoringService, PredictiveAnalyticsService
]

instance Ditto : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Ditto for real-time data exchange"
    DTDFVocab:enables RealTimeMonitoringService, PredictiveAnalyticsService
]

instance UnrealEngine : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Leverages Unreal Engine for rich, interactive visualization"
    DTDFVocab:enables InteractiveVisualizationService
]

instance RealTimeMonitoringService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Real-time monitoring through insights for building systems"
    DTDFVocab:provides RealTimeSynchronizationInsight, InteractiveVisualizationInsight
]

instance PredictiveAnalyticsService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Predictive analytics for forecasting maintenance needs"
    DTDFVocab:provides PredictiveInsight
]

instance OperationalOptimizationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Operational optimization for energy efficiency and resource management"
    DTDFVocab:provides OptimizationInsight
]

instance EnhancedDecisionMakingService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Enhanced decision-making capabilities for facility management"
    DTDFVocab:provides DecisionMakingInsight
]

instance StakeholderCollaborationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Stakeholder collaboration across building lifecycle phases"
    DTDFVocab:provides CollaborationInsight
]

instance InteractiveVisualizationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Interactive visualization for Facility Managers to monitor system states"
    DTDFVocab:provides InteractiveVisualizationInsight
]

instance RealTimeSynchronizationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Continuous synchronization between physical and digital counterparts"
]

instance PredictiveInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Forecasting of potential system failures or maintenance needs"
]

instance OptimizationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Recommendations for improving operational efficiency"
]

instance DecisionMakingInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Data-driven insights for facility management decisions"
]

instance CollaborationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Enhanced communication and coordination among stakeholders"
]

instance InteractiveVisualizationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Immersive interfaces for real-time monitoring and infrastructure control"
]

instance DTFrameworkHub : DTDFVocab:Environment [
    base:desc "Central DT Framework hub coordinating multiple DT instances"
    base:contains BuildingControlEngineerRole, FacilityManagerRole, DTEngineerRole
]

instance BuildingEnvironment : DTDFVocab:Environment [
    base:desc "AECO domain infrastructure assets including buildings"
    base:contains Building
]

instance BuildingControlEngineerRole : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Handles device modeling and deployment initiation"
]

instance FacilityManagerRole : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Performs real-time monitoring and control"
]

instance DTEngineerRole : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Extends capabilities through service integration"
]

instance Building : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Building asset for digital twin modeling across lifecycle phases"
]

instance virtual_to_physical_interaction : DTDFVocab:VirtualToPhysical [
    base:desc "Bidirectional communication mechanisms feed control signals back to Building Control Systems (BCS), allowing Facility Managers to interact with the deployed DT for real-time monitoring and control of physical assets."
]

instance twinning_time_scale : DTDFVocab:TimeScale [
    base:desc "Real-time data exchange capabilities ensure continuous synchronization between physical buildings and their digital counterparts"
]

instance dt_constellation : DTDFVocab:Constellation [
    base:desc "Modular architecture with standardized extension points for custom service integration; central DT Framework hub facilitating bidirectional data exchange and holistic building lifecycle management through coordinated roles"
]

instance life_cycle_stages : DTDFVocab:EvolutionStage [
    base:desc "The Digital Twin lifecycle encompasses initial design (BIM-based device modeling by Building Control Engineers), deployment (automated artifact generation via Model-Driven Engineering), operational monitoring (real-time data synchronization and interactive visualization), and evolution (custom service integration). Transition between phases is managed through MDE-driven transformations from static BIM models to dynamic DTs, with governance enforced by role-specific responsibilities (Building Control Engineers, Facility Managers, DT Engineers) as per Table I."
]

instance dt_technical_connection : DTDFVocab:TechnicalConnection [
    base:desc "The framework employs a layered system architecture coupling BIM with middleware for automated commissioning, integrating Eclipse Hono and Ditto for real-time data exchange, ensuring reliable and scalable connectivity between physical devices and the digital twin."
]

instance dt_hosting_deployment : DTDFVocab:Deployment [
    base:desc "A model-driven framework enables scalable DT deployment with automated processes that reduce manual intervention, supporting modular architecture with runtime configuration management for adjustments without full redeployment and scalability from individual components to entire infrastructure systems."
]

instance standardization : DTDFVocab:Standardization [
    base:desc "The framework adheres to AECO-specific standards, particularly Building Information Modeling (BIM), for initial device modeling and representation of building control system components. It implements standardized extension points to ensure interoperability and modular integration of custom services, aligning with industry requirements for DT system compatibility and data exchange protocols."
]
